strategies.name: EMA Crossover
strategies.description: Classic trend-following strategy. Buys when the fast EMA crosses above the slow EMA — price momentum is shifting upward. Sells on the reverse cross. Works well on trending stocks like TQQQ and Tencent on 5m-15m timeframes.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY when EMA(fast) crosses above EMA(slow). SELL when EMA(fast) crosses below EMA(slow).

params.label: Fast EMA Period
params.hint: Shorter = more sensitive to price changes

learn.what_it_is: EMA Crossover tracks two exponential moving averages - a fast one and a slow one. When they cross, it signals a potential trend change.
learn.how_it_works: Fast EMA reacts quickly. Slow EMA reflects broader trend. When fast crosses above slow, buyers gaining momentum.
entry_signal: BUY when Fast EMA crosses ABOVE Slow EMA
SELL when Fast EMA crosses BELOW Slow EMA

parameters_explained.fast_period: How many bars fast EMA looks back. Lower=more sensitive. Try 5-10.
parameters_explained.slow_period: How many bars slow EMA looks back. Higher=smoother. Try 20-50.

pro_tips: Fast period should be less than half slow period
Classic combo: 5/20 intraday, 50/200 swing
Add RSI to filter false crossovers
TQQQ 5/20 on 5m generates 3-5 signals/day
learn.risk_warning: EMA crossovers lag - by the time the signal fires, the move has already started.

strategies.name: RSI Mean Reversion
strategies.description: Buys when RSI is oversold (market has fallen too far, too fast) and sells when RSI is overbought. Best in ranging/sideways markets. Works well on Tencent intraday on 1m-5m. Avoid using in strong trending markets.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY when RSI drops below oversold threshold (e.g. 30). SELL when RSI rises above overbought threshold (e.g. 70).

params.label: Oversold Level
params.hint: Buy signal fires below this level

params.label: Overbought Level
params.hint: Sell signal fires above this level

learn.what_it_is: RSI measures how overbought or oversold a stock is on 0-100 scale. Created by Wilder in 1978.
learn.how_it_works: Below 30 = oversold (potential bounce). Above 70 = overbought (potential pullback).
entry_signal: BUY when RSI drops below oversold (30)
SELL when RSI rises above overbought (70)
best_conditions: Tick or 1m for fast mean reversion
pro_tips: RSI below 20 is STRONG oversold
Combine with BB: RSI oversold + lower band = high probability
Never fight a strong trend with RSI alone
learn.risk_warning: In downtrends, RSI can stay oversold for extended periods. Always use stop losses.

strategies.name: Bollinger Band Grid
strategies.description: Uses Bollinger Bands as dynamic grid levels. Buys at the lower band (oversold zone) and sells at the upper band (overbought zone). Acts like a grid system that adapts to volatility. Best in choppy, ranging markets.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY when price touches or breaks below the lower Bollinger Band. SELL when price touches or breaks above the upper Bollinger Band.

params.label: BB Period
params.hint: Lookback period for moving average. 20 is standard

params.label: Standard Deviations
params.hint: Width of bands. Higher = fewer but stronger signals

learn.what_it_is: Bollinger Bands create a dynamic price channel that adapts to volatility. Buy at lower band, sell at upper band.
learn.how_it_works: Price stays within bands 95% of time. Lower band = cheap. Upper band = expensive.
entry_signal: BUY at lower Bollinger Band
SELL at upper Bollinger Band
pro_tips: BB Squeeze precedes big moves
Combine with RSI for confirmation
Watch middle band as profit target
learn.risk_warning: Price can walk the band during trends. Use stop losses.

strategies.name: Momentum Breakout
strategies.description: Catches strong momentum moves when price breaks out to new highs or lows over a lookback window. Designed to enter breakouts early and ride the move. Works well on volatile stocks like TQQQ and Tencent during news-driven sessions.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY when current price makes a new high over the lookback period. SELL when current price makes a new low over the lookback period.

params.label: Lookback Bars
params.hint: Number of bars to look back for high/low. Higher = stronger breakout required

learn.what_it_is: Buy new highs, sell new lows. Core of the Turtle Trading system from the 1980s.
learn.how_it_works: New N-bar high = strongest buyers in N bars. Ride the trend until reversal.
entry_signal: BUY new high over lookback
SELL new low over lookback

parameters_explained.lookback: Bars to look back. 20 on 5m = 100 minutes.

pro_tips: Turtle system: 20-bar entry, 10-bar exit
Add volume confirmation
Use trailing stop = 2x ATR
learn.risk_warning: Lower win rate (40-50%) but large average wins. Be comfortable with small losses.

strategies.name: MACD Momentum
strategies.description: Uses MACD crossover to identify momentum shifts. Buys when the MACD line crosses above the signal line (bullish momentum building). Sells on the reverse. A favourite among professional traders for capturing medium-term momentum on 5m-15m charts.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY when MACD line crosses above Signal line. SELL when MACD line crosses below Signal line.

params.label: Signal Period
params.hint: Standard is 9. Smoothing of MACD line

learn.what_it_is: MACD tracks relationship between two EMAs to identify momentum shifts. Created by Gerald Appel in 1970s.
learn.how_it_works: MACD = Fast EMA minus Slow EMA. When it crosses above signal line, momentum shifting up.
entry_signal: BUY on bullish MACD cross
SELL on bearish MACD cross
pro_tips: Standard (12,26,9) watched by institutions
Cross ABOVE zero line is stronger
Histogram turning positive precedes crossover
learn.risk_warning: MACD lags price. In fast markets, crossover comes after most of the move.

strategies.name: VWAP Reversion
strategies.description: Trades mean reversion back to VWAP (Volume Weighted Average Price) — the fair value benchmark used by institutional traders. Buys when price drops significantly below VWAP, sells when it rises significantly above. Excellent intraday strategy for liquid stocks like Tencent and TQQQ.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY when price deviates below VWAP by more than deviation_pct%. SELL when price deviates above VWAP by more than deviation_pct%.

params.label: Deviation % from VWAP
params.hint: How far price must deviate from VWAP to trigger. Lower = more trades, higher = stronger signals

learn.what_it_is: VWAP is the most important intraday benchmark. Represents true average price weighted by volume.
learn.how_it_works: Institutions buy below VWAP, sell above. When price deviates, smart money pulls it back.
entry_signal: BUY when price falls X% below VWAP
SELL when price rises X% above VWAP

parameters_explained.deviation_pct: How far from VWAP to trigger. 0.1% = sensitive, 0.5% = significant only.

pro_tips: VWAP resets daily
Combine with RSI for stronger signal
Most powerful in first 2 hours
learn.risk_warning: On trending days, price stays far from VWAP all session.

strategies.name: Symmetric Grid
strategies.description: Dynamically spaces grid levels using ATR(14) to adapt to each stock's actual volatility. Restarts fresh every trading day at market open. All orders cancelled at market close. Profits from price oscillation within the grid.
strategies.signal_logic: DAILY OPEN: Calculates ATR(14), sets grid spacing = ATR x multiplier, places N buy limits below CMP. ON BUY FILL: Places sell TP above. ON TP FILL: Replenishes buy. AT CLOSE: Cancels all, closes positions. NEXT OPEN: Rebuilds with fresh ATR.

params.label: Grid Levels (each side)
params.hint: Number of buy levels below CMP + same number of sell levels above CMP

params.label: ATR Multiplier
params.hint: Grid spacing = ATR(14) x this value. 0.75 = 75% of daily range per level. Higher = wider grid.

params.label: Fallback Spacing %
params.hint: Used only if ATR calculation fails

params.label: Take Profit % per level
params.hint: TP per grid level. Usually same as grid spacing

params.label: Emergency SL Boundary %
params.hint: If price moves this far from CMP at startup, flatten ALL positions immediately

learn.what_it_is: Automated market-making strategy. Profits from price oscillation without predicting direction. Buy below, sell above, repeat.
learn.how_it_works: At open, calculates ATR(14) for spacing. Places buy limits below. On fill, places sell above. On sell fill, replaces buy. Every cycle = profit.
entry_signal: BUY limits below CMP at open
Spacing from ATR(14) x 0.75
No direction prediction needed
exit_signal: Each BUY paired with SELL above
TP = one grid spacing per cycle
Emergency SL if price falls X%

parameters_explained.grid_levels: Buy orders below CMP. More = more capital, more profit potential.
parameters_explained.atr_multiplier: Spacing = ATR x this. 0.75 = 75% of daily range.

pro_tips: Rebuilds daily with fresh ATR
All cancelled at close - no overnight risk
Start with 3 levels, scale to 5-7
More levels = more trades but more capital
learn.risk_warning: If price trends down all day, buys fill but sells may not reach before close.

strategies.name: Buffett Bot
strategies.philosophy: Buy wonderful companies at fair prices
strategies.description: Quality stocks in established uptrends. Uses long-term trend + low volatility + RSI zone as proxies for business quality.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY when price > SMA(200) AND RSI between 40-65 AND ATR below average. SELL when price < SMA(200).

params.label: Capital Budget
params.hint: Total capital for this bot. Auto-sizes positions.

params.label: Max Positions
params.hint: Max stocks held. Budget / positions = size per stock.

learn.what_it_is: Implements Buffett's core principle: buy quality businesses at reasonable prices during calm markets.
learn.how_it_works: Three filters: price above 200 SMA (uptrend), RSI 40-65 (fair price zone), ATR below average (calm market).
entry_signal: BUY when all 3 conditions met: trend + calm + fair price

parameters_explained.rsi_min: Min RSI to avoid panic buying
parameters_explained.vol_filter: ATR must be below average x this

pro_tips: Buffett's edge is holding long term - this captures the ENTRY philosophy
The volatility filter forces buying in calm, not chaos
Works best on stocks you believe in fundamentally
learn.risk_warning: In bear markets, 200 SMA breaks and bot stops entering - correct behavior.

strategies.name: Graham Bot
strategies.description: Contrarian strategy that buys beaten-down stocks near their lows with oversold RSI. Father of value investing.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY when price within 10% of lookback low AND RSI < 35. SELL when RSI > 60 OR +15% from entry.

params.label: Low Lookback
params.hint: How far back for the low.

params.label: Capital Budget
params.hint: Total capital for this bot. Auto-sizes positions.

params.label: Max Positions
params.hint: Max stocks held. Budget / positions = size per stock.

learn.what_it_is: Benjamin Graham's deep value approach - buy statistically cheap stocks expecting mean reversion.
learn.how_it_works: Price near lookback low + RSI oversold = statistically cheap with momentum confirming fear.
entry_signal: BUY near lookback low AND RSI oversold

parameters_explained.proximity_pct: How close to low to trigger

pro_tips: Works best on quality stocks unfairly sold off
Be patient - recovery can take time
Never use on deteriorating fundamentals
learn.risk_warning: Value traps are real. Always use stop losses.

strategies.name: Livermore Bot
strategies.description: Breakout with volume confirmation and ATR expansion. Enters on new highs with institutional volume.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY on new N-bar high AND volume > 1.5x average AND ATR expanding. Trail with 2x ATR stop.

params.label: Capital Budget
params.hint: Total capital for this bot. Auto-sizes positions.

params.label: Max Positions
params.hint: Max stocks held. Budget / positions = size per stock.

learn.what_it_is: Jesse Livermore turned $1,000 into $100 million trading breakouts. This implements his pivot point system.
learn.how_it_works: New high + volume surge + ATR expansion = real breakout, not fake-out.
entry_signal: BUY on new N-bar high with volume and ATR confirmation
pro_tips: Volume filter is critical - rejects false breakouts
Let winners run with trailing stops
Only trade in direction of larger trend
learn.risk_warning: 40-50% win rate but large average winners. Many small losses before big wins.

strategies.name: Dalio Bot
strategies.description: Low-volatility trend strategy. Only enters when trend is clear, price is near VWAP, and market is calm.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY when EMA(50) rising AND price within 0.5% of VWAP AND ATR below average. SELL when EMA turns down.

params.label: Vol Threshold
params.hint: ATR must be below avg x this.

params.label: Capital Budget
params.hint: Total capital for this bot. Auto-sizes positions.

params.label: Max Positions
params.hint: Max stocks held. Budget / positions = size per stock.

learn.what_it_is: Ray Dalio built the world's largest hedge fund on balanced risk. This captures his patient, systematic approach.
learn.how_it_works: Three conditions: EMA rising (trend), near VWAP (fair value), low ATR (calm).
entry_signal: BUY when trend + fair value + calm all align
exit_signal: SELL when EMA turns down or 2% above VWAP
pro_tips: Works beautifully on ETFs (SPY, QQQ)
VWAP filter prevents buying at tops
On calm days generates multiple clean entries
learn.risk_warning: Rarely trades on volatile days - intentional. Dalio's philosophy: do less, do it better.

strategies.name: Simons Bot
strategies.philosophy: Find the pattern, quantify the edge, execute systematically
strategies.description: Pure statistical mean reversion using Z-score. Enters when price is 2+ standard deviations from mean with RSI confirmation.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY when Z-score < -2.0 AND RSI < 30. SELL when Z-score returns to 0 (mean).

params.label: Z-Score Threshold
params.hint: Entry at this many std devs.

params.label: Capital Budget
params.hint: Total capital for this bot. Auto-sizes positions.

params.label: Max Positions
params.hint: Max stocks held. Budget / positions = size per stock.

learn.what_it_is: Jim Simons founded Renaissance Technologies with 66% annual returns over 30 years. This implements statistical mean reversion.
learn.how_it_works: Z-score below -2.0 = price is statistically extreme. RSI confirms oversold. Enter and wait for reversion to mean.
entry_signal: BUY when Z-score < -2.0 AND RSI < 30
pro_tips: Z-score of -3.0 is extremely rare and strong
Run on many instruments for diversification
Statistical edge exists across many trades
learn.risk_warning: In trending markets Z-score can stay extreme. Never risk more than you can afford on any single signal.

strategies.name: Turtle Trader
strategies.description: The original Turtle Trading system from 1983. Buy 20-bar highs, exit on 10-bar lows. Turned $1,600 into $200 million.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY on new 20-bar high. EXIT on new 10-bar low. Position size based on ATR risk.

params.label: Exit Lookback
params.hint: Exit on new low over this.

params.label: Capital Budget
params.hint: Total capital for this bot. Auto-sizes positions.

params.label: Max Positions
params.hint: Max stocks held. Budget / positions = size per stock.

learn.what_it_is: In 1983 Richard Dennis taught 23 novices his exact rules. They made $100M+ each. This is that system.
learn.how_it_works: Buy new 20-bar high (System 1). Exit on new 10-bar low. Simple mechanical rules.
entry_signal: BUY on new 20-bar high
pro_tips: The entry doesn't matter, the exit does
40% win rate but 3:1 win:loss ratio
Never cut a winner short
Trade multiple uncorrelated symbols
learn.risk_warning: Extended drawdown periods are normal. Trust the system.

strategies.name: Soros Bot
strategies.philosophy: Markets are reflexive - price affects fundamentals in self-reinforcing loops
strategies.description: Identifies self-reinforcing trends via full EMA alignment + accelerating MACD + expanding volume.
strategies.signal_logic: BUY when EMA(5)>EMA(20)>EMA(50) AND MACD histogram positive+growing AND volume above average.

params.label: Capital Budget
params.hint: Total capital for this bot. Auto-sizes positions.

params.label: Max Positions
params.hint: Max stocks held. Budget / positions = size per stock.

learn.what_it_is: George Soros made $1B in one day breaking the Bank of England. His reflexivity theory explains self-reinforcing trends.
learn.how_it_works: Full EMA alignment + accelerating MACD + volume = the reflexivity loop is active.
entry_signal: BUY when EMA(5)>EMA(20)>EMA(50) AND MACD growing AND volume above avg
exit_signal: SELL when EMA alignment breaks OR MACD turns negative
pro_tips: Full EMA alignment is rare but powerful
Soros's edge was SIZE when confident
Reflexivity loops can persist for days on TQQQ
learn.risk_warning: Concentrates in momentum - suffers in reversals. Trailing stop is essential.

sections.title: Trend Following
sections.description: Ride the trend until it ends.

sections.title: Breakout
sections.description: Enter when price breaks key levels.
